subcodes.first_line: A company of the handmaidens of that land, their petitions having attained the Most Holy Court, received their answers from the heaven of Divine Will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمعی از اماء آن ارض عرایضشان بساحت اقدس فائز جواب هر یک از سماء مشیت نازل و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital
